name: browser-model-gpt-2
description: > **Projekt The Brain — Etap 1** > Implementacja GPT-2 (124M) w TypeScript 7 / WebAssembly z benchmarkiem inferencji w przeglądarce.

scripts.build:wasm: asc assembly/tensor.ts assembly/scratch.ts assembly/attention.ts assembly/feedforward.ts assembly/block.ts assembly/model.ts assembly/entry.ts --outFile build/model.wasm --target release --exportRuntime --enable simd
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build
scripts.benchmark: node dist/main.js weights/gpt2.safetensors build/model.wasm "The brain is"
